proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_olaparib in this cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_enzalutamide.
Patients receiving treatment_abiraterone have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_abiraterone.
Patients receiving treatment_docetaxel have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_docetaxel.
Patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_lu177_psma.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS: 3.83 mo on olaparib vs 3.73 mo off (diff=+0.094 mo, n=5098 vs 44902, Welch t-test p=0.00329). Olaparib is associated with significantly longer PFS overall.
Mean PFS 3.73 on enzalutamide vs 3.75 off (diff=-0.026, p=0.153). No significant overall difference.
Mean PFS 3.74 on vs 3.75 off (diff=-0.006, p=0.776). No overall difference.
Mean PFS 3.73 on vs 3.75 off (diff=-0.017, p=0.381). No overall difference.
Mean PFS 3.74 on vs 3.74 off (diff=-0.004, p=0.872). No overall difference.
Mean PFS 3.80 on vs 3.74 off (diff=0.064, p=0.137). No significant overall difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with mcrpc=1 (castration-resistant disease) have shorter mean pfs_months than mcrpc=0 patients.
Patients with visceral_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without visceral_mets.
Patients with liver_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without liver_mets.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients without bone_mets.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative linear coefficient).
Higher gleason_score is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS 3.51 mCRPC vs 4.03 non-mCRPC (diff=-0.521, p=1.58e-181). Castration-resistant disease strongly shortens PFS.
Mean PFS 3.71 vs 3.75 (diff=-0.048, p=0.0345). Visceral mets associated with marginally shorter PFS.
Mean PFS 3.74 vs 3.74 (diff=-0.002, p=0.948). No significant difference unadjusted.
Mean PFS 3.75 vs 3.74 (diff=0.011, p=0.624). No unadjusted difference.
Linear coefficient β=-1.161 (SE=0.012, p=0). Each ECOG point reduces PFS by ~1.16 months — large effect.
β=-0.0062 (p=0.486). Univariate Gleason effect not significant; emerges only after adjustment.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive linear coefficient).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher psa_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher nlr is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: β=0.495 (p=1.47e-166). Each 1 g/dL higher albumin → +0.49 mo PFS.
β=-0.00042 per U/L (p=0.000181). Higher LDH → shorter PFS, as expected.
β=-0.00050 (p=0.00663). Higher ALP → shorter PFS.
β=-0.0115 (p=0.0225). Direction NEGATIVE in univariate — opposite to clinical expectation; small magnitude (-0.012 mo per g/dL).
β=-0.00334 per ng/mL (p=3.48e-260). Strong negative linear association.
β=-0.00064 (p=0.507). CRP not significantly associated with PFS unadjusted.
β=0.00243 (p=0.577). NLR not associated with PFS in this cohort.
β=-0.0749 per % (p=9.91e-226). Each 1% weight loss → -0.075 mo PFS — strong, robust signal.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_olaparib has greater PFS benefit in patients with brca2_mutation=1 than in brca2_mutation=0 patients (positive treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months).
treatment_lu177_psma has greater PFS benefit in psma_high=1 patients than psma_high=0 patients (positive interaction).
treatment_pembrolizumab has greater PFS benefit in msi_high=1 patients than msi_high=0 patients (positive interaction).
AR-V7 positivity (ar_v7_positive=1) reduces the benefit of treatment_enzalutamide on pfs_months (negative treatment_enzalutamide × ar_v7_positive interaction).
AR-V7 positivity reduces the benefit of treatment_abiraterone on pfs_months (negative interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β=1.619 (p=4.33e-61). In BRCA2+ patients, olaparib effect is +1.55 mo; in BRCA2- patients, -0.07 mo. Massive effect modification — strongly supports synthetic-lethality mechanism.
Interaction β=-0.0174 (p=0.737). No effect modification by PSMA expression — surprising, given Lu-177-PSMA is a PSMA-targeted radioligand.
Interaction β=-0.340 (p=0.153). Direction even slightly NEGATIVE in MSI-high (effect -0.27 mo), opposite to expectation; not significant.
Interaction β=0.0025 (p=0.957). No effect modification by AR-V7 — does not replicate published resistance pattern.
Interaction β=0.0476 (p=0.334). No effect modification.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within brca2_mutation=1 patients only, those receiving treatment_olaparib have longer mean pfs_months than those not.
Within brca2_mutation=0 patients only, treatment_olaparib does NOT meaningfully prolong pfs_months (effect approximately 0).

analyses.result_summary: BRCA2+ subgroup: olaparib n=529 vs no-olaparib n=4467. Mean PFS 5.22 vs 3.67 mo (diff=+1.55 mo, p=3.95e-27). Confirms targeted benefit.
BRCA2- subgroup: olaparib effect = -0.073 mo (p=0.0191). Slightly negative, nominally significant due to large n; clinically near-zero.

proposed_hypotheses.text: tp53_mutation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
pten_loss=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
cdkn2a_loss=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
her2_amplification=1 is associated with different (likely shorter) pfs_months.
psma_high=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.
msi_high=1 is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: diff=0.003 mo, p=0.866. No association in this cohort.
diff=0.021 mo, p=0.621. Not significant.
diff=-0.042 mo, p=0.102. Not significant.
diff=0.020 mo, p=0.704. Not significant.
Mean PFS 3.75 vs 3.73 (diff=0.020, p=0.273). Univariate not significant; signal emerges in multivariable model.
diff=0.035, p=0.515. Not significant; rare phenotype (3% prevalence).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Black patients (race_ethnicity='black') have shorter mean pfs_months than white patients.
Hispanic patients have shorter mean pfs_months than white patients.
Asian patients have different mean pfs_months than white patients.
Patients with medicaid insurance have shorter pfs_months than patients with private insurance.
Uninsured patients have shorter pfs_months than privately insured.
Patients with rural_residence=1 have shorter pfs_months than non-rural patients.

analyses.result_summary: Black vs white: diff=-0.0005 mo, p=0.987. No measurable disparity.
Hispanic vs white: diff=-0.0037 mo, p=0.886. Null.
Asian vs white: diff=0.0561 mo, p=0.145. Trend toward longer PFS in Asian patients but not significant.
Medicaid vs private: diff=0.0046 mo, p=0.871. No insurance-based disparity in PFS.
Uninsured vs private: diff=-0.0101 mo, p=0.831. Null.
Rural vs urban: diff=0.0152 mo, p=0.504. No effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: diabetes_mellitus=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
chronic_kidney_disease=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
heart_failure=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
copd=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.
atrial_fibrillation=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: diff=-0.0287, p=0.19. Trend toward shorter PFS but NS.
diff=0.0334, p=0.231. NS; direction slightly POSITIVE — opposite of expectation.
diff=-0.0032, p=0.916. No association.
diff=0.0186, p=0.355. No association.
diff=-0.0367, p=0.279. No association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among the 24 germline SNPs (snp_rs*), at least one shows a significant association (p<0.05) with pfs_months that survives multiple-testing correction (Bonferroni p<0.002).
snp_rs4986893 (CYP2C19 *3 loss-of-function variant) is associated with different pfs_months than wild-type.
snp_rs429358 (APOE) is associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Top SNPs by p-value: snp_rs4986893 (diff=-0.092, p=0.0148), snp_rs429358 (diff=0.047, p=0.0655), snp_rs1065852 (diff=-0.048, p=0.0937). Only 1/24 SNPs reaches nominal p<0.05; none survive Bonferroni. No germline pharmacogenomic signal detected.
diff=-0.0921 mo, p=0.0148. Nominal p=0.015 but doesn't survive multiple testing.
diff=0.0468 mo, p=0.0655. Not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: β=-0.0009 per point (p=0.797). Pain not associated with PFS unadjusted.
β=0.0036 (p=0.656). Not associated.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age, ECOG, mCRPC, visceral_mets, LDH, albumin, PSA, gleason, treatment_olaparib remains positively associated with pfs_months.
After adjustment, none of treatment_enzalutamide, treatment_abiraterone, treatment_docetaxel, treatment_lu177_psma, treatment_pembrolizumab show a significant overall PFS effect.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted olaparib β=0.1384 mo, p=1.91e-64. Robust positive effect after covariates.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for age, ECOG, mCRPC, gleason, visceral_mets, albumin, ldh, psa, weight_loss, the treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months remains positive and significant.
Adjusted treatment_pembrolizumab × msi_high interaction on pfs_months remains null.
Adjusted treatment_lu177_psma × psma_high interaction on pfs_months remains null.
Adjusted treatment_enzalutamide × ar_v7_positive interaction on pfs_months remains null.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction β=1.437, p=0. Confirmed; effect virtually unchanged after covariate adjustment.
Adjusted interaction β=0.0316, p=0.566. NS after adjustment.
Adjusted β=-0.0047, p=0.697. NS.
Adjusted β=0.0046, p=0.664. NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_olaparib benefit on pfs_months is concentrated in lower ECOG (ecog_ps=0) patients (treatment effect larger in ECOG 0 than in ECOG 1 or 2).
treatment_docetaxel has greater benefit (or less harm) in lower ECOG subgroups.

analyses.code: stratify by ecog_ps; ttest olaparib in each stratum
analyses.result_summary: Olaparib effect by ECOG: ecog0 diff=0.178 (p=0.000835); ecog1 diff=0.057 (p=0.162); ecog2 diff=0.148 (p=0.0439). Effect appears similar across ECOG strata in unadjusted analysis.
Docetaxel effect by ECOG: ecog0=-0.029 (p=0.36); ecog1=-0.014 (p=0.591); ecog2=-0.008 (p=0.863). No clear pattern.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for clinical factors and treatments, brca2_mutation remains independently associated with longer pfs_months.
After adjustment, psma_high remains independently associated with longer pfs_months.
After adjustment, none of tp53_mutation, pten_loss, cdkn2a_loss, pik3ca_mutation, her2_amplification, fgfr_alteration, or keap1_mutation are significantly associated with pfs_months.
Rare fusions (ret_fusion, ros1_fusion, ntrk_fusion, nrg1_fusion) and met_exon14_skipping show no association with pfs_months after adjustment.

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ all genes + treatments + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: BRCA2 adjusted β=0.154 mo, p=1.32e-109. Independent positive association even with olaparib in model.
PSMA-high adjusted β=0.0218 mo, p=2.75e-07. Modest but very significant positive association.
All other gene/marker p-values >0.05 after adjustment: tp53 p=0.255; pten_loss p=0.135; cdkn2a_loss p=0.917; pik3ca p=0.632; her2_amp p=0.167; fgfr p=0.226; keap1 p=0.631. Confirmed null.
Rare fusions all NS: ret p=0.324; ros1 p=0.883; ntrk p=0.693; nrg1 p=0.6; met_exon14 p=0.613; braf_v600e p=0.345.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for clinical prognostic factors, race_ethnicity is not significantly associated with pfs_months (no race-based outcome disparity).
After adjustment, insurance_type is not significantly associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted race coefficients (vs reference): black p=0.524; hispanic p=0.606; other p=0.524. All NS — no measurable race disparity in this cohort.
Adjusted insurance coefficients: medicare p=0.17; private p=0.239; uninsured p=0.469. All NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_olaparib × brca2_mutation interaction on pfs_months is similar in magnitude in mcrpc=1 and mcrpc=0 subgroups (synthetic-lethality benefit not modified by castration-resistant status).

analyses.code: stratify by mcrpc; OLS pfs ~ olaparib*brca2 in each stratum
analyses.result_summary: mCRPC=1 subgroup: interaction β=1.630, p=6.02e-36. mCRPC=0 subgroup: interaction β=1.627, p=1.33e-28. Both show large, highly significant interactions of similar magnitude — synthetic-lethality benefit is independent of mCRPC status.

proposed_hypotheses.text: age_years has a positive linear association with pfs_months in this cohort (older patients show longer PFS; counter-intuitive).
treatment_olaparib benefit (interaction with age_75plus, defined as age>=75) does not differ between younger (<75) and older (>=75) patients.
treatment_docetaxel benefit differs between age <75 and age >=75 patients (interaction).

analyses.result_summary: β=0.174 mo per year (p=0). Each year of age associated with +0.17 months PFS — strong positive linear association (likely an artifact of how the synthetic dataset encodes age vs. survival, but a real statistical pattern in this cohort).
Interaction β=0.0317, p=0.632. No effect modification by age >=75.
Interaction β=0.0200, p=0.648. NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A composite Halabi-style risk score (count of: low albumin <3.5, high LDH >250, high ALP >150, ECOG>=1) is negatively associated with pfs_months.
mets_count (sum of visceral, liver, bone, adrenal mets) is negatively associated with pfs_months.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ risk_score', data=df) where risk_score = low_albumin+high_ldh+high_alp+high_ecog
analyses.result_summary: β=-0.567 per risk point, p=0. Each additional poor-prognostic feature reduces PFS by ~0.57 mo.
β=-0.0043 per metastatic site, p=0.727. Number of metastatic sites does not strongly predict PFS in this dataset.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age, ECOG, mCRPC, gleason, albumin, LDH, PSA, diabetes_mellitus is still not significantly associated with pfs_months.
Adjusted chronic_kidney_disease is not associated with pfs_months.
Adjusted heart_failure is not associated with pfs_months.
Adjusted depression_anxiety_diagnosis is not associated with pfs_months.
Adjusted prior_malignancy is not associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted β=-0.0022, p=0.709. Confirmed NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: spo2_pct is positively associated with pfs_months.
bmi is associated with pfs_months.
calcium_mg_dl (hypercalcemia of malignancy marker) is negatively associated with pfs_months.
creatinine_mg_dl is associated with pfs_months.
platelets_k_ul is associated with pfs_months.
prior_lines_of_therapy is negatively associated with pfs_months (more prior lines = shorter remaining PFS).
years_since_diagnosis is negatively associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: β=-0.0102, p=0.205. Direction negative as hypothesized but NS unadjusted.
β=-0.0007, p=0.897. Not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_docetaxel benefit on pfs_months is greater in patients with visceral_mets=1 than visceral_mets=0 (positive interaction; clinical lore that docetaxel is preferred for visceral disease).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β=0.0516, p=0.294. NS — visceral disease does not modify docetaxel effect in this cohort.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_enzalutamide benefit on pfs_months is greater in mcrpc=1 patients than mcrpc=0 patients (positive treatment_enzalutamide × mcrpc interaction).
treatment_abiraterone benefit on pfs_months is greater in mcrpc=1 than mcrpc=0 (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β=-0.0494, p=0.18. Direction slightly NEGATIVE; NS. Enzalutamide does not preferentially benefit mCRPC over non-mCRPC patients in this cohort.
Interaction β=0.0298, p=0.449. NS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab benefit on pfs_months differs in brca2_mutation=1 vs 0 patients (positive interaction, hypothesizing HRD as a tumor-mutational-burden surrogate driving immune response).
treatment_olaparib benefit on pfs_months differs by ar_v7_positive status (interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction β=0.2169, p=0.119. Trend toward positive interaction (effect +0.26 mo in BRCA2+ vs +0.04 mo in BRCA2-) but NS at p=0.12.
Interaction β=-0.0174, p=0.815. NS — olaparib effect does not depend on AR-V7 status, consistent with the BRCA2-driven mechanism.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A multivariable OLS model of pfs_months including age, ECOG, mCRPC, visceral/liver/bone_mets, PSA, gleason, BRCA2, AR-V7, MSI-high, PSMA-high, albumin, LDH, hemoglobin, weight_loss, prior_lines, all 6 treatments, pain, and fatigue achieves R^2 > 0.5.
In this multivariable model, treatment_olaparib retains a positive, significant adjusted coefficient.

In this multivariable model, age_years (positive), ecog_ps, mcrpc, psa_ng_ml, weight_loss_pct_6mo, gleason_score, ldh_u_l (negative), albumin_g_dl, brca2_mutation, and psma_high (positive) are all significant predictors of pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Model R^2 = 0.948. Far above 0.5 — the assembled feature panel explains ~95% of PFS variance, indicating PFS is essentially a deterministic function of these features in this cohort.
Olaparib adjusted β=0.146 mo, p=2.31e-100. Confirms targeted-therapy signal; effect persists despite BRCA2 main effect being in the model.

All listed predictors significant at p<0.001 except hemoglobin (p=0.292) and AR-V7 (p=0.174). Adjusted β: age=0.174 (+), ecog=-1.152 (-), mcrpc=-0.375 (-), psa=-0.00271 (-), weight_loss=-0.0766 (-), albumin=0.478 (+), ldh=-0.00050 (-), gleason=-0.0111 (-), brca2=0.154 (+), psma_high=0.0217 (+).
